title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on the street in concrete jungle】

jazz funk.rare groove.acid jazz

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Sweetback's Theme (From Sweet Sweetback's Baadasssss Song) – Melvin Van Peebles" into "The Phantom – Bubbha Thomas and The Lightmen Plus One".

Enjoy the transition from cinematic grooves to rare grooves with a hint of mystery to jazz-funk sounds.

今回は「SWEETBACK'S THEME (FROM SWEET SWEETBACK'S BAADASSSSS SONG) - MELVIN VAN PEEBLES」から「The Phantom · Bubbha Thomas and The Lightmen Plus One」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
シネマティックなグルーヴから、怪しさを帯びたレアグルーヴ〜ジャズファンク・サウンドへの繋ぎをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GQq7p8pyv2E
